Add a Clipper Card

Oops! There are errors in your submission.

Contact customer support

Enter the number from the back of your Clipper card (either 10 digits or 19 digits).

A security code is not required for this card.

Security code is required for newer Clipper cards (ones with a 19 digit card number).

You can give your Clipper card a nickname to help keep track of your payment methods. The last 4 digits of the card will always display.

Apply For Discounts

Youth and senior riders can receive reduced fares and access to discounted passes. Apply for your discount Clipper card and start saving every time you ride!
